assumptions: The developer has a browser and can receive email, or can run Docker for the self-hosted alternate.
No Tiger Cloud account, project, or service is assumed to exist yet.

developer_goal: Reach an interactive SQL session against a Tiger Data Postgres database using the primary getting-started route.

first_success.outcome: A SQL client returns CURRENT_DATE or an equivalent connection proof against a running Tiger database.
first_success.observable_signal: For Tiger Cloud console Data view or SQL editor, SELECT CURRENT_DATE returns the current date; for Docker, psql reaches an interactive prompt on the local TimescaleDB container.

route_selection.surface: Tiger Cloud console self-service web, with self-hosted Docker as a documented alternate
route_selection.rule: Managed Tiger Cloud create-service docs begin at account creation and offer free or trial services without requiring marketplace billing; Docker is a complete no-account install path that conflicts with the account-creation boundary.

candidates.name: Tiger Cloud trial signup, create service, console Data view SELECT CURRENT_DATE
candidates.reason: Create-service guide still documents a $1000-credit 30-day trial signup and plan selection, but signup field lists are missing and Free Plan messaging conflicts with trial framing.

candidates.name: Tiger Cloud Free Plan signup then console SQL editor
candidates.reason: Blog and product copy describe a no-card unlimited Free Plan, while the create-service page still leads with trial signup details; when Free is chosen and which wizard fields apply are unclear.

candidates.name: AWS or Azure Marketplace linked signup
candidates.reason: Adds marketplace purchase and account-linking steps beyond the standalone console route.

candidates.name: Self-hosted TimescaleDB Docker to psql
candidates.reason: Fully documented no-account local path, but it is not the Tiger Cloud console journey and skips account creation.

candidates.name: Tiger CLI service creation
candidates.reason: Adds CLI install and still opens browser OAuth or login for account access.

required_path.action: Sign up for Tiger Cloud and confirm the email address if the managed route is selected.

required_fields.label: Signup details
required_fields.notes: Docs say add your details then Start your free trial; exact fields are not listed and the signup app shell does not expose them statically.

required_fields.label: Pricing plan selection
required_fields.notes: Trial guide says select pricing plan after confirm; Free Plan availability and ordering versus trial are unresolved.

required_path.observable_result: The developer is logged into Tiger Console.

required_path.action: Create a Tiger Cloud service from the wizard and download the connection config.

required_fields.label: Service wizard configuration fields
required_fields.notes: Docs say follow the wizard without enumerating every control for free versus standard.

required_path.observable_result: The service reaches Running and config credentials are available.

required_path.action: Connect with Data view or SQL editor and run SELECT CURRENT_DATE.

required_fields.label: Console connection surface
required_fields.notes: Data view and SQL editor are peer console options; psql is a longer local alternate.

required_path.observable_result: The query returns the current date.

prerequisites.description: Docker is required only if the self-hosted container candidate is selected.

external_gates.description: Managed signup requires email confirmation before Tiger Console use on the documented trial path.
Plan selection after signup may gate free versus trial entitlements.

unavoidable_waits.description: Confirmation email delivery on the managed signup path.
Service construction takes a few seconds before Running.

platform_outcomes.description: Tiger Cloud provisions the service and issues connection configuration including passwords.

excluded.item: Marketplace AWS or Azure account linking
excluded.reason: Longer billing-integrated branches than standalone console signup.

excluded.item: psql install when using console Data view or SQL editor
excluded.reason: Local psql is an alternate connection method after the service is Running.

excluded.item: Post-install TimescaleDB tutorials after Docker psql
excluded.reason: Listed as next steps after the container is running.

sources.title: Introducing Agentic Postgres Free Plan
evidence_supported: Free Plan no credit card no time limit positioning

sources.title: Tiger Cloud signup
evidence_supported: Static shell does not enumerate required fields

sources.title: Install TimescaleDB from a Docker container
evidence_supported: Self-hosted Docker and psql alternate without Tiger Cloud account

uncertainties.question: What exact fields, agreements, password rules, and authentication alternatives appear in current Tiger Cloud signup?
uncertainties.impact: Account-creation actions cannot be counted for the managed route.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Fresh-account screenshots from console.cloud.tigerdata.com/signup through email confirmation and first console home.

uncertainties.question: At what point does a new account choose Free Plan versus the 30-day trial, and which create-service wizard fields follow each choice?
uncertainties.impact: Plan choice changes entitlements, possible payment gates, and service configuration burden.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Reconcile create-service trial copy with Free Plan docs via a dated console walkthrough.

uncertainties.question: Should the atlas entry measure Tiger Cloud console first success or the self-hosted Docker psql path?
uncertainties.impact: Docker skips account creation and changes the entire required_path.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Human judgment applying SELECTION-POLICY account-creation and self-service-web rules.
